title: The Ultimate Guide to Perfect Extraction
description: Learn how to dial in your espresso like a professional barista
content: Extraction is the heart of coffee brewing. In this guide, we dive deep into grind size, pressure, temperature, and yield to help you achieve the perfect shot of espresso every morning.
author: Jessica Bean

title: Understanding Burr Sets
description: Flat vs. Conical burrs and why it matters for your cup
content: The grinder is arguably the most important piece of equipment you will ever buy. We compare flat and conical burrs to understand how they impact flavor clarity and body.
author: Michael Roast
